headline: Missouri American Water to Host Ribbon Cutting for Refurbished Elevated Storage Tank
summary: Missouri American Water will be hosting a ribbon cutting for the refurbished elevated storage tank located on Karnes Road. Details on the event can be found below.

headline: American Water Joins Dialogue at 2026 NARUC Summer Policy Summit
summary: American Water (NYSE: AWK), the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the U.S., joins important conversations during the 2026 National Association of Regulatory Utility Commissioners (NARUC) Summer Policy Summit, held July 19 through July 22, 2026, in Minneapolis, Minnesota.
